dependencies" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="340" width="210" x="10" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21543" parent="hW-x-8fdiQQhnm0eq0Mn-4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2>Python Packages</h2><div>PyTorch,&nbsp;<span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">OpenCV,&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">scikit,</span></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">ONNX Runtime,</span></div><div>InsightFace, dlib,</div>...<div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="175" x="15" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21542" parent="hW-x-8fdiQQhnm0eq0Mn-4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2><font>OS Packages</font></h2><div><font>Python-Develop,<br></font></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;"><font>CMake, Ninja, GCC-C++,</font></span></div><div><font><span style="background-color: transparent;">libGL,&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: transparent;">FFmpeg,</span></font></div><div><font>Git, aria2</font></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;"><font>...</font><br></span></div><div><span style="background-color: initial;"><br></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="180" x="15" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hW-x-8fdiQQhnm0eq0Mn-10" parent="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21550" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="ComfyUI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="340" width="210" x="220" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21544" parent="hW-x-8fdiQQhnm0eq0Mn-10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2>ComfyUI</h2><div>Stable version</div><div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="175" x="15" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21545" parent="hW-x-8fdiQQhnm0eq0Mn-10" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2>ComfyUI-Manager</h2><div>(Python package version)</div><div><br></div><div><div>For managing custom nodes</div></div><div>&amp; downloading models</div><div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="145" width="180" x="15" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21562" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;fillColor=#a20025;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=none;swimlaneLine=0;swimlaneFillColor=#A20025;startSize=31;" value="<div>User storage</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="451" width="360" x="460" y="189" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7AaPfAoWrVpkrp2eCH7k-9" parent="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21562" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2>User Profile</h2><div>Workflows,&nbsp;<span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Settings</span><span style="background-color: transparent;">, Logs</span></div><div><span style="background-color: transparent;"><br></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="160" x="10" y="61" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21546" parent="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21562" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2>Models</h2><div style="">- By&nbsp;ComfyUI-Manager</div><div style="">- By HuggingFace Hub</div><div style=""><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="170" x="180" y="61" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hW-x-8fdiQQhnm0eq0Mn-12" parent="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21562" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;glass=0;" value="<h2>Caches</h2>Speed up subsequent starts<br><div><div><div><br></div></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="170" x="90" y="281" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GZbU13Y0LTtaWGYFEq5n-2" parent="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21562" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;" value="<div>- Not come with this image</div><div>- Not affected by image updates</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="245" x="70" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7AaPfAoWrVpkrp2eCH7k-8" parent="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21562" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<h2>Inputs / Outputs</h2><div>Files used / generated</div><div>by ComfyUI</div><div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="10" y="165.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hW-x-8fdiQQhnm0eq0Mn-11" parent="foELoz8nutSXalCJW3ig-21562" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;glass=0;" value="<h2>Custom Nodes</h2><div style="text-align: left;"><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">&nbsp;- Git Repositories</span></div><div><div style="text-align: left;"><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">&nbsp;- User-level Python packages</span></div><div><div><div><br></div></div></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="93.5" width="170" x="180" y="165.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 448px; height: 1px; padding-top: 16px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 421px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- Update via pulling new image.
- Images are automatically rebuilt on top of
a base image for each new ComfyUI release.
